history.content:
<thought>
I am at the top-left interior cell facing right. The cell directly ahead is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. The open path goes downward, so I should turn right to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing down, and the cell directly below me is open floor. The path downward is the only safe way forward from this corner.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down with an open floor cell directly below me, so I should continue moving down along the left corridor.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am still facing down, but the cell below leads into a row where the right side is blocked by lava. I should continue to the open area below before turning.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down at the left edge, and the cell below is open floor. Moving into the open corridor is the best next step.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am in the open corridor on the left and still facing down. The cell below is open, so I should continue downward toward the bottom row where I can turn right toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am still facing down, and the cell directly below is open floor. Continuing down will bring me to the bottom corridor, which is the route toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am now on the bottom accessible row at the left side, still facing down toward a wall. To proceed toward the goal on the right, I need to face right first.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right, but the cell directly ahead is lava. I cannot move forward, so I should turn to find a safe path, and turning left will face me upward toward the open corridor.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
Facing up, the cell ahead is open floor, and moving upward is the safe way to go around the lava blocking the direct route to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am still facing up, and the cell directly ahead is open. Continuing upward keeps me on the safe left corridor around the lava barrier.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing up with another open cell directly ahead. Advancing further up the left side continues the safe path toward a route around the lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing up, but the cell directly ahead is a wall, so moving forward is blocked. The open path is to my right, so I should turn right to face it.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing right, but the cell directly ahead is lava, so moving forward would be unsafe. The only safe way to continue is to turn downward toward the open corridor below.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down, and the cell directly below is open floor. Moving forward will let me enter the safe corridor toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down, and the cell directly below is open floor. Continuing forward keeps me on the safe path toward the lower area where the goal is located.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down, and the cell directly below is open floor on the goal row. Advancing brings me closer before turning toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at the bottom accessible row facing down, so moving forward would hit the wall. The goal is to the right, so I should turn left to face right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing right, but the cell directly to my right is lava, so I cannot move forward. To make progress toward the goal, I need to go up along the left side first, which means turning left to face up.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
Facing up, the cell ahead is open floor, and moving upward is the safe path around the lava toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly ahead is still open floor, so continuing upward safely advances along the only clear route around the lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing up, and the cell directly ahead is open floor. Continuing upward moves me closer to the top corridor without touching lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing up, but the cell directly ahead is a wall. The path cannot continue upward, so I should turn right to face the open corridor on my right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right, but the cell directly ahead is lava, so moving forward would be unsafe. The open path is below me, so I should turn right to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing down, and the cell directly below is open floor. Moving forward lets me enter the safe corridor toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
